name: Cocoons
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In a large bowl, combine flour, 2/3 cup powdered sugar, and pecans. Mix thoroughly.
3. Add the melted margarine and mix with hands until combined.
4. Lightly oil two large baking sheets.
5. Using amounts of about 1-1/2 tablespoons, shape the dough into cocoon or oval forms by hand.
6. Place the cookies on the prepared baking sheets.
7. Bake in a 350°F oven for 30 minutes, or until the bottoms are light brown. Do not overcook.
8. Allow the cookies to cool completely.
9. In a plastic bag, sift the remaining 2/3 cup powdered sugar.
10. Drop 5 to 6 cookies at a time into the bag and toss gently.
11. When all cookies are fully coated in sugar, transfer them to a platter and serve.
